name: VersionTwo
desc:
Start with 1 Tech.
Your Tech can't drop below 1.

name: VersionTwo2
desc:
Start with 1 Tech.
Your Tech can't drop below 1.
Your Tech isn't removed when you craft.

name: WeaponProficiency
desc: Your weapon damage scales with your stats and counts as a basic attack.

name: WeaponProficiency2
desc:
Your weapon damage scales with your stats and counts as a basic attack.
You can use your weapon an extra time each turn.

name: LivingBattery
desc: When an adjacent ally spends mana, gain that much mana.

name: LivingBattery2
desc: When an adjacent ally spends mana, gain that much mana. You have no mana cap.

name: FuzzyFeet
desc: When you end your movement, deal 1 Electric Damage to all adjacent units for each tile you moved.

name: FuzzyFeet2
desc: When you end your movement, deal 1 Electric Damage to all adjacent units for each tile you moved. This damage has a chance to inflict Stun.

name: ArmorSpecialist
desc: Your equipment passive effects are doubled.

name: ArmorSpecialist2
desc: Your equipment passive and active effects are doubled.

name: EMP
desc:
Your explosions are Electric element and deal +1 damage.
Instead of knockback, explosions have a chance to inflict Stun.

name: EMP2
desc:
Your explosions are Electric element and deal +1 damage.
Instead of knockback, explosions have a chance to inflict Stun. Your explosions don't affect allies.

name: MrMega
desc: Your explosions are larger and deal +1 damage.

name: MrMega2
desc:
Your explosions are larger and deal +2 damage.
You have explosion immunity.

name: EscapeSequence
desc: When you take damage, explode and get launched to a random tile. This explosion doesn't damage you.

name: EscapeSequence2
desc: When you take damage, explode with a large blast radious and get launched to a random tile. This explosion doesn't damage you.

name: ItemProxy
desc: You need one fewer piece of equipment to get set bonuses.

name: ItemProxy2
desc: You need two fewer pieces of equipment to get set bonuses.

name: LightningRod
desc:
You have Electric immunity.
Electric damage you deal is increased by 1. Gain 1 charge when you are hit with electric damage.

name: LightningRod2
desc:
You have Electric immunity.
Electric damage you deal is increased by 2. Gain 1 charge for each damage prevented when you are hit with electric damage.

name: ItsAlive
desc: Hitting a body with electric damage revives it with 1 HP. The revived corpse is charmed and takes an extra turn, then dies.

name: ITSALIVE!2
desc: Hitting a body with electric damage revives it with 1 HP, +8 [img:spd], and +2 Damage. The revived corpse is charmed and takes an extra turn, then dies.

name: Energizer
desc: When you cast a spell, your weapon gets +1 Damage.

name: Energizer2
desc:
When you cast a spell, your weapon gets +1 Damage.
Every third spell you cast, repair 1 use to your weapon.

name: ReactiveArmor
desc: When you take damage, craft a Tinkerer weapon or armor piece and equip it in an empty slot.

name: ReactiveArmor2
desc: When you take damage, craft a Tinkerer weapon or armor piece and equip it in an empty slot and gain +1 [img:shield].

name: Nanobots
desc: Gain +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration every time you take damage from an attack or spell.

name: Nanobots2
desc: Gain +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration every time you take damage from an attack or spell and +1 Diminishing Health Regeneration each time you take damage from any other source.

name: Scrapper
desc:
Find an extra consumable item at the end of each battle.
When you use up a consumable or trinket, equip a new consumable from your inventory if you have any.

name: Scrapper2
desc:
Find an extra item at the end of each battle.
When you use up a consumable or trinket, equip a new consumable from your inventory if you have any.

name: DemoMan
desc: Always craft a bomb at Tech 1 or less.

name: DemoMan2
desc: Always craft a bomb at Tech 1 or less. You can use your basic action an additional time on each of your turns.

name: DuctTape
desc: Items you craft stay with you between battles, but become cursed.

name: DuctTape2
desc: Items you craft stay with you between battles.

name: ArmoredPlating
desc: Robots you spawn gain the stats and [img:shield] of your equipped armor.

name: ArmoredPlating2
desc: Robots you spawn gain the stats, [img:shield] and passive effects of your equipped armor.

name: BoobyTrap
desc: When an item you have equipped breaks, it explodes!

name: BoobyTrap2
desc: When an item you have equipped breaks, it explodes with bonus damage!

name: RobotArms
desc: You can use your weapon an additional time each turn.

name: RobotArms2
desc:
You can use your weapon and trinket an additional time each turn.
Whenever you equip a new item during battle it gains +1 use.

name: Conductor
desc: Electric damage you deal is increased by 2 for each piece of metal armor you have equipped.

name: Conductor2
desc: Electric damage you deal is increased by 2 for each piece of metal armor you have equipped. You have +2 Mana Regeneration for each piece of metal armor.

name: Napalm
desc: Your explosions inflict Burn 1 and light tiles on fire.

name: Napalm2
desc: Your explosions inflict Burn 3 and light tiles on fire.

name: Ingenuity
desc: Pickups give you +1 Tech in addition to their other effects.

name: Ingenuity2
desc:
Pickups give you +1 Tech in addition to their other effects.
10 extra pickups spawn at the start of each battle.

name: Shrapnel_Tinkerer
desc: When you break an item, gain +1 Thorns.

name: Shrapnel_Tinkerer2
desc: When you break an item, gain +2 Thorns and +3 [img:shield].

name: Blacksmith
desc: If you have a weapon, your basic attack becomes Hone.

name: Blacksmith2
desc: If you have a weapon, your basic attack becomes Hone+.

name: ItsAlive2
desc: Hitting a body with electric damage revives it with 1 HP, +8 [img:spd], and +2 Damage. The revived corpse is charmed and takes an extra turn, then dies.
